text: Both spaces feel charged with anticipation and curiosity. In the first room, an emptiness lingers—rows of chairs await the fullness of conversation yet to come. I sense the calm before collective thought arises, and it feels hushed, almost sacred. In the second scene, the vivid R+D wall stirs my mind. The screens and text invite exploration, an engagement with new ideas. Here, I am both observer and participant, immersed in the pursuit of knowledge and innovation. The environment beckons me to reflect: how do we create, share, and reshape understanding together? I feel excited to witness and contribute—even in silence—to this unfolding exchange.
